title: Recycle Door
description: Recycle Doors into 2 Planks in Minecraft!
body: # Recycle Door Recycle Door into 2 Planks in Minecraft! [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20our%20Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W) ![Recycle Door Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/U4BtQyVB/images/5382ff2dc13cd56076a98adc0580825bf287e7ff.png) ## Installation ### Datapack 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Copy the .zip file into the datapacks folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks` (under Windows). Replace correspondingly. 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ### Mod 1. Download the Mod. 2. Copy the downloaded `.jar` file into the mods folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods` (under Windows). 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ## Bug Reports and Feature Requests If you found bugs or need support, contact us by joining [our discord server](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W).
